mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM actor WHERE deleted = 0
AND actor_name LIKE '%' || #{actorName} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM actor WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO actor (actor_name, positioning, personality, image_url, description, status, create_user_id) VALUES (#{actorName}, #{positioning}, #{personality}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE actor SET actor_name = #{actorName}, positioning = #{positioning}, personality = #{personality}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE actor SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
